name: Iron Nicole
description: the Iron Queen has been defeated, and it seemed like everything is going well in Knothole. Except not quite. Before her defeat, the Iron Queen left some of her electric data into the digital realm. And with enough time, has founded Nicole. Knowing how powerful she was as Iron Nicole, it’s her only way to escape her prison. Nicole tried to fight it but it was too late. Now known as Iron Nicole, she has the power to use her nanites in nefarious ways, making her a threat to everyone.
creator: LowlifeGlitch
